Identity.Name: StingZoneCategoryCodes
Identity.Definition: Semantic category of an IfcZone, carried as Pset_StingSpatialCodes.ZoneCategory. Disambiguates zones when an element belongs to multiple (e.g. one IfcZone for fire compartmentation, another for acoustic separation, another for clinical pressure). Each category drives a different STING validator pack and different filter / overlay graphic conventions.

Governance.StandardsBasis: BS 9999 (fire); BS 8233 (acoustic); HTM 03-01 (clinical pressure); CIBSE Guide A (HVAC zoning); ISO 19650-2 §5.3 spatial structure conventions

Value.Definition: Fire compartmentation zone per BS 9999 / Approved Document B. Boundary walls are fire-rated; doors are FD30/60/90/120.
Smoke control zone per BS 7346. Boundaries are smoke-stopped; AOV / pressurisation strategy applies.
Acoustic isolation zone per BS 8233 / Approved Document E. Boundaries carry sound-reduction requirements (Rw).
HVAC zoning — a single zone served by one VAV / FCU / AHU branch with common setpoint and schedule.
Clinical activity zone — defines clinical use (ward / theatre / imaging / clean-room). Drives pressure regime, MGS provision, observation requirements.
Pressure-cascade zone per HTM 03-01. Carries StingPressureRegimes target.
Security / access-control zone. Defines who can enter; drives ACR placement, lock specification.
Ionising-radiation controlled / supervised area per NCRP 147 / IRR 2017. Cross-references StingRadiationZones.
MRI safety zone per ACR. Cross-references StingMRIZones (Zone I-IV).
Generic building zone — wing / department / functional group not classified elsewhere. Use sparingly.
Unknown / not yet assigned. IDS fails at Stage 3+ for zones whose category is required by the active validator pack.
